requirements.summary: Deploy the current version 50 of the application to the Internet Computer mainnet without modifying any application code
acceptanceCriteria: The application is successfully deployed to the IC mainnet
The admin dashboard delete contact request functionality is accessible on the live deployment
All existing features remain functional on the live environment

file_operations.description: Add a deployment verification checklist section that confirms version 50 features (including the admin dashboard delete contact request functionality) are working correctly on mainnet after deployment. Include steps to verify all existing features remain functional in the live environment.
